name: 14-invalid-empty-evidence
description: Capability's evidence[] is empty. Per schema-rule, minItems: 1 is required — a capability with no evidence reference is a claim without provenance, which is exactly what Reeve exists to prevent.
notes: Both declared and observed capabilities must cite at least one evidence record. Declared capabilities cite the source schema fragment (e.g., MCP tools/list entry); observed cite the sandbox trace entry.
